title: selaginella obtusa
intro: Selaginella obtusa, also known as spikemoss or spore fern, is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The plant contains bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Selaginella obtusa is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system.
